name: shangkong-website-suite
description: Aural Hushi Wind full-stack website, CMS admin, and API suite.

scripts.install:all: npm ci --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix aural-api ci && npm --prefix aural-website ci && npm --prefix aural-admin ci
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run check:api
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:website && npm run test:admin
scripts.test:e2e: npm run seed:demo && npm --prefix aural-website run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run seed:demo && npm --prefix aural-website run test:e2e:smoke
scripts.check:api: npm --prefix aural-api run check && npm --prefix aural-api run audit:prod && cd aural-api && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npx prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://hushi:placeholder@127.0.0.1:5432/hushi npx prisma validate --schema prisma/postgresql/schema.prisma
scripts.build:admin: VITE_API_BASE=https://api.shangkong.xyz VITE_SITE_URL=https://www.shangkong.xyz npm --prefix aural-admin run build:prod
scripts.quality: npm run docs:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run check:api && npm run backup:verify && npm run build:admin && npm run build:website
